creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Gmelin from comment #3)

Last month's <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-doc/2021-December/001068.html> and the response suggest improvements to: 

intro(8)
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=intro&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>

>  intro -- introduction to system maintenance procedures and commands


In particular, from the first and second e-mails: 

> - whichever ZFS command(s) control mounting at boot

> efibootmgr(8)

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=efibootmgr&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>
